cases.prompt: 내 앱 출시했는데 어떻게 바이럴 시키지? 인스타랑 커뮤니티 홍보 둘 다 해보고 싶어.

assertions.text: Produces a channel-by-channel playbook: in-app share mechanics, Instagram post sequence, Korean community threads
Each tactic ships a concrete artifact (post draft, screenshot spec, share-button copy), not abstract advice
Includes a launch-day timeline and word-of-mouth seed list

cases.prompt: Launch day is next Tuesday. Need a viral playbook — Reddit, Product Hunt, in-app share. Give me actual post drafts.

assertions.text: Designs in-app share mechanics tied to K-factor
Delivers copy-paste-ready community/post drafts rather than framework analysis
